infrastructure.name: Dockerfile
infrastructure.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the NowCart Vite/React/TypeScript frontend: compiles static assets with Node in a builder stage, then serves them via a hardened Nginx runtime image with SPA routing/API proxy config and a health check.

infrastructure.name: builder
infrastructure.summary: Build stage based on node:20-alpine that installs npm dependencies with `npm ci` and runs `npm run build` to produce the Vite production bundle.

infrastructure.name: runtime
infrastructure.summary: Runtime stage based on nginx:alpine that replaces the default nginx config with a custom SPA-routing/API-proxy config, copies the built assets from the builder stage, exposes port 80, and defines a container health check.

infrastructure.name: Dockerfile
infrastructure.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the FastAPI backend: a builder stage installs Python dependencies via uv into a virtualenv, and a slim runtime stage copies the venv plus application code, runs as a non-root user, exposes port 8000, and starts uvicorn with a health check for EC2 deployment.

infrastructure.name: builder
infrastructure.summary: Build stage based on python:3.11-slim that installs the uv package manager and resolves/installs Python dependencies from server/pyproject.toml and server/uv.lock into an isolated virtualenv at /app/.venv.

infrastructure.name: runtime
infrastructure.summary: Final slim python:3.11-slim runtime image that copies the prebuilt virtualenv and application code, adds the BigBasket.csv data file, drops privileges to a non-root user, exposes port 8000, defines a HEALTHCHECK, and launches the app with uvicorn.

infrastructure.name: deploy.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow that deploys NowCart on every push to master: builds the Vite frontend and syncs it to S3 with CloudFront cache invalidation, then SSHes into the EC2 host to write the production .env, git pull the backend, and restart the systemd nowcart service.

infrastructure.name: deploy-frontend
infrastructure.summary: Job that checks out the code, installs and builds the client with npm, then syncs the built dist/ folder to the nowcart-frontend-strizzy S3 bucket and invalidates the CloudFront distribution cache.

infrastructure.name: deploy-backend
infrastructure.summary: Job that runs after deploy-frontend succeeds; SSHes into the production EC2 instance to write environment secrets to /opt/nowcart/server/.env and /etc/nowcart.env, then git pulls the latest master branch and restarts the nowcart systemd service.

infrastructure.name: docker-compose.yml
infrastructure.summary: Local development Docker Compose stack wiring together the FastAPI backend, nginx-served Vite frontend, Redis (cache/session), and DynamoDB Local (persistence), each with health checks and a shared bridge network.

infrastructure.name: backend
infrastructure.summary: FastAPI backend service built from server/Dockerfile, configured via environment variables for DynamoDB, Redis, Groq/Gemini LLM providers, and CORS; exposes port 8000.

infrastructure.name: frontend
infrastructure.summary: Nginx-served Vite frontend built from client/Dockerfile, exposed on port 3000 and depending on the backend being healthy.

infrastructure.name: redis
infrastructure.summary: Redis 7 Alpine service providing cart/session state and LLM response caching, with a persistent volume and periodic save policy.

infrastructure.name: dynamodb-local
infrastructure.summary: Local DynamoDB emulator service (amazon/dynamodb-local) for product/user/order persistence during development, backed by a persistent volume.

service:client/Dockerfile.name: Dockerfile
service:client/Dockerfile.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the NowCart Vite/React/TypeScript frontend: compiles static assets with Node in a builder stage, then serves them via a hardened Nginx runtime image with SPA routing/API proxy config and a health check.

service:server/Dockerfile.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the FastAPI backend: a builder stage installs Python dependencies via uv into a virtualenv, and a slim runtime stage copies the venv plus application code, runs as a non-root user, exposes port 8000, and starts uvicorn with a health check for EC2 deployment.

service:server/Dockerfile:builder.name: builder
service:server/Dockerfile:builder.summary: Build stage based on python:3.11-slim that installs the uv package manager and resolves/installs Python dependencies from server/pyproject.toml and server/uv.lock into an isolated virtualenv at /app/.venv.

service:server/Dockerfile:runtime.name: runtime
service:server/Dockerfile:runtime.summary: Final slim python:3.11-slim runtime image that copies the prebuilt virtualenv and application code, adds the BigBasket.csv data file, drops privileges to a non-root user, exposes port 8000, defines a HEALTHCHECK, and launches the app with uvicorn.

pipeline:.github/workflows/deploy.yml.name: deploy.yml

step:.github/workflows/deploy.yml:deploy.name: deploy-frontend

step:.github/workflows/deploy.yml:deploy.name: deploy-backend
step:.github/workflows/deploy.yml:deploy.summary: Job that runs after deploy-frontend succeeds; SSHes into the production EC2 instance to write environment secrets to /opt/nowcart/server/.env and /etc/nowcart.env, then git pulls the latest master branch and restarts the nowcart systemd service.
